top_signals.title: Gold Heads for Weekly Loss as Traders Consider Iran, Rates Path
top_signals.summary: Gold headed for a weekly loss as investors assessed the fallout from renewed fighting in the Middle East and the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pfizer Vaccine Dispute Hits Polish, Romania Air Traffic Agencies
top_signals.summary: Poland and Romania’s legal battles with Pfizer Inc. over unused Covid-19 vaccine purchases are spilling into the funding of the eastern European nations’ air traffic agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Abivax $920 million cash haul lets it prepare for solo U.S. launch instead of relying on a buyer, CEO tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Its latest fundraising round provides the French biotech with enough cash to finance operations through 2029.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK financial system strengthened with new safeguards for major technology providers
top_signals.summary: Government has designated four major global cloud services and technology providers as Critical Third Parties (CTPs).

top_signals.title: South Africa’s Absa Faces Deeper Slide as Analysts Turn Cautious
top_signals.summary: A selloff in Absa Group Ltd. shares may have further to run as the South African lender’s disappointing earnings guidance causes once-bullish analysts to turn cautious on the stock.
